summary: Battle Command now displays draggable selected-brigade anchor and fallback handles on the wide tactical map.

flow: verify visible 基準 and 後退 handles for the selected brigade

observations.dragResult: anchor handle moved on the tactical map
observations.log: 第4戦列歩兵大隊の基準位置をX39 Y29へ指定。

implementedBehavior: selected-brigade anchor can be dragged and committed through setStandingOrderAnchor
selected-brigade fallback destination can be dragged and committed through setStandingOrderFallbackDestination
existing click/tap command modes remain available
knownLimitations: dragging edits only the selected brigade's anchor/fallback points, not freehand frontline geometry
mobile still primarily relies on tap/click command modes plus horizontal map scrolling
